form_name: R2R - Affair Controlling - Standard Cost Calculation

questions.text: The release of the calculated standard price in AFM has significant financial impacts.
What is the purpose of using the standard price in relation to the Moving Average Price (MAP)?
options: To determine the financial status of AFM
To calculate the total revenue of the company
To identify the variance between MAP and standard price
To calculate the total cost of goods sold

questions.text: In the context of AFM, how is the standard price calculation for BOMs different from single products?
options: It is lower due to economies of scale
It is calculated based on customer demand
It includes other costs related to BOMs operations, such as Co-packing cost

questions.text: Which components are added to Transfer Price (PVIS) to determine the standard cost of sale?
options: Product development costs and marketing expenses
Landed cost factor including Freight, Custom duty and clearance, and Others

questions.text: The standard cost update in SAP requires the costing period to be opened once a year for each company.
